channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SUNCLAY] Sundaram-Clayton Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs. 4.50/- per Share for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Sundaram-Clayton Ltd has announced an interim dividend of Rs. 4.50/- per share, amounting to Rs. 9.92 Cr, for the financial year ending 31st March 2026. The record date for the purpose of the interim dividend is 3rd April 2026. The dividend payment will be made within 30 days from the declaration of interim dividend as per the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Sundaram-Clayton Ltd declares an interim dividend of Rs. 4.50/- per share for FY 2025-2026.
  • The dividend amounts to Rs. 9.92 Cr.
  • The record date for the dividend is 3rd April 2026.
  • The dividend payment will be made within 30 days from the declaration as per the Companies Act, 2013.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sundaram-Clayton Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [TINEAGRO] Spright Agro Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading Regulations
item.description:
Spright Agro Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited Financial Results for the period ended on March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the Audited Financial Results will be communicated in due course.

  • Spright Agro Ltd closes trading window for insider trading regulations compliance.
  • The closure is effective from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited Financial Results for the period ended on March 31, 2026.
  • The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the Audited Financial Results will be communicated later.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tine Agro Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SAATVIKGL] Saatvik Green Energy's Subsidiary Receives Order of INR 638.26 Crores from Renowned Solar Modules Manufacturer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Saatvik Green Energy Ltd announced that its material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has received and accepted an order worth INR 638.26 Crores from a renowned Solar Modules Manufacturer for the supply of Solar Cell G12 R Type. The order will be executed by March 2027. This information is provided as per the SEBI Listing Regulations and is available on the company's website.

  • Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited received an order worth INR 638.26 Crores
  • The order is from a renowned Solar Modules Manufacturer
  • The order is for the supply of Solar Cell G12 R Type
  • The order will be executed by March 2027
  • The information is provided as per the SEBI Listing Regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [VISTAPH] Vista Pharmaceuticals Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 and Year-Ending Results in 2026
item.description:
Vista Pharmaceuticals Ltd, with scrip code 524711, has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated employees, directors, and officers. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ending 31.03.2026. The exact date of the board meeting for considering the said audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Vista Pharmaceuticals Ltd announces closure of trading window from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after Q4 and year-ending results declaration in 2026
  • Designated employees, directors, and officers are advised not to enter into any transaction involving dealing/trading in shares during the closure period
  • Exact date of board meeting for considering audited financial results to be announced later
  • Closure in accordance with the Company's minimum Standards Code of Conduct and SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VISTA PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SUNCLAY] Sundaram-Clayton Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs. 4.50/- per share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Sundaram-Clayton Ltd has declared an interim dividend of Rs. 4.50/- per share (90%) on 2,20,46,162 equity shares of Rs. 5/- each fully paid up, absorbing a sum of Rs. 9.92 Cr, for the financial year ending 31st March 2026. The record date for the purpose of the interim dividend is 3rd April 2026. The dividend payment will be made within a period of 30 days from the declaration of interim dividend, as provided in the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Sundaram-Clayton Ltd declares an interim dividend of Rs. 4.50/- per share for FY 2025-26
  • The dividend is 90% on 2,20,46,162 equity shares of Rs. 5/- each fully paid up, absorbing a sum of Rs. 9.92 Cr
  • The record date for the purpose of the interim dividend is 3rd April 2026
  • The dividend payment will be made within 30 days from the declaration as per Companies Act, 2013

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sundaram-Clayton Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [HOCL] Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd. Announces Trading Window Closure for Q4 FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons/insiders from April 1, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the audited standalone & consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026 of the financial year 2025-2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations), 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the aforesaid financials will be intimated separately.

  • Trading window closure for Q4 FY 2025-2026
  • Closure from April 1, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours after the financial results declaration
  • Applicable for all designated persons/insiders
  • In accordance with SEBI Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015
  • Board Meeting date to consider the financials will be intimated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN ORGANIC CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [RAIN] Rain Industries Ltd: Nivee Holdings Pvt Ltd Acquires 0.0238% Shares of Rain Eidusenies Limited
item.description:
Rain Industries Ltd has disclosed the acquisition of 80,000 equity shares (0.0238%) of Rain Eidusenies Limited by Nivee Holdings Pvt Ltd from the open market on March 25, 2026. This acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and Nivee Holdings Pvt Ltd has provided the necessary statement in the prescribed format.

  • Nivee Holdings Pvt Ltd, a Persons Acting in Concert (PAC) with Rain Industries Ltd, has acquired 0.0238% shares of Rain Eidusenies Limited from the open market.
  • The acquisition was made on March 25, 2026.
  • The total number of shares acquired is 80,000.
  • This acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • Nivee Holdings Pvt Ltd has provided the necessary statement in the prescribed format.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rain Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AVAILFC] Archana Coal Private Limited Sells 8,16,296 Shares of Available Finance Ltd for INR 10,63,96,020.64
item.description:
Archana Coal Private Limited, a promoter of Available Finance Ltd, has sold 8,16,296 equity shares of the company for INR 130.34 each, amounting to INR 10,63,96,020.64. The sale took place on 24th March, 2026.

  • Archana Coal Private Limited sold 8,16,296 equity shares of Available Finance Ltd.
  • The shares were sold for INR 130.34 each, amounting to INR 10,63,96,020.64.
  • The sale took place on 24th March, 2026.
  • Available Finance Ltd shares are listed on the stock exchange.
  • Archana Coal Private Limited is a promoter of Available Finance Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVAILABLE FINANCE LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [ALPSINDUS] Alps Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window for Audited Financial Result Consideration
item.description:
Alps Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Designated Persons, members of the Promoter Group, Directors, immediate relatives of Designated Persons, and other connected persons. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and NSE Circular Ref. No. NSE/CML/2019/11 dated April 2, 2019. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the disclosure of the Audited Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Alps Industries Ltd closes trading window in accordance with SEBI regulations.
  • The closure is effective from April 1, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen after 48 hours from the disclosure of the Audited Financial Results.
  • The closure applies to all Designated Persons, members of the Promoter Group, Directors, immediate relatives of Designated Persons, and other connected persons.
  • The closure is for the consideration of the Audited Financial Result for the quarter ended on 31st March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALPS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BANSWRAS] Banswara Syntex Ltd. Closes Trading Window under SEBI Regulations for Q4 2026
item.description:
Banswara Syntex Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for all promoters, directors, key managerial personnel, designated employees, connected persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the declaration of financial results for the quarter/year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting for considering the financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Banswara Syntex Ltd. closes trading window under SEBI regulations
  • Closure from 1st April, 2026, for promoters, directors, and others
  • Trading window to reopen after 48 hours from financial result declaration
  • Board meeting date for financial results consideration to be announced later
  • Compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANSWARA SYNTEX LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update
